en: This is the number of the people of Israel, the heads of fathers' houses, the commanders of thousands and hundreds, and their officers who served the king in all matters concerning the divisions that came and went, month after month throughout the year, each division numbering 24,000:
zh: 以色列人各家族的首領、千夫長、百夫長和服事王的所有官長，都按著他們的數目分定班次，每年按月輪班，每班有二萬四千人。

en: Jashobeam the son of Zabdiel was in charge of the first division in the first month; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 負責正月第一班的，是撒巴第業的兒子雅朔班，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: He was a descendant of Perez and was chief of all the commanders. He served for the first month.
zh: 他是法勒斯子孫中的首領，統管正月那一班所有的軍長。

en: Dodai the Ahohite was in charge of the division of the second month; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 負責二月那一班的是亞哈希人朵代，他那一班還有副官密基羅，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: The third commander, for the third month, was Benaiah, the son of Jehoiada the chief priest; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 三月第三班的軍長是大祭司耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: This is the Benaiah who was a mighty man of the thirty and in command of the thirty; Ammizabad his son was in charge of his division.
zh: 這比拿雅是那三十位勇士中的一位，管理那三十人；他那一班還有他的兒子暗米薩拔。

en: Asahel the brother of Joab was fourth, for the fourth month, and his son Zebadiah after him; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 四月第四班的軍長是約押的兄弟亞撒黑，接續他的是他的兒子西巴第雅；他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: The fifth commander, for the fifth month, was Shamhuth the Izrahite; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 五月第五班的軍長是伊斯拉人珊合，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: Sixth, for the sixth month, was Ira, the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 六月第六班的軍長是提哥亞人益吉的兒子以拉，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: Seventh, for the seventh month, was Helez the Pelonite, of the sons of Ephraim; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 七月第七班的軍長是以法蓮子孫中比倫人希利斯，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: Eighth, for the eighth month, was Sibbecai the Hushathite, of the Zerahites; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 八月第八班的軍長是謝拉家族戶沙人西比該，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: Ninth, for the ninth month, was Abiezer of Anathoth, a Benjaminite; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 九月第九班的軍長是便雅憫支派亞拿突人亞比以謝，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: Tenth, for the tenth month, was Maharai of Netophah, of the Zerahites; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 十月第十班的軍長是謝拉家族尼陀法人瑪哈萊，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: Eleventh, for the eleventh month, was Benaiah of Pirathon, of the sons of Ephraim; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 十一月第十一班的軍長是以法蓮子孫中的比拉頓人比拿雅，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: Twelfth, for the twelfth month, was Heldai the Netophathite, of Othniel; in his division were 24,000.
zh: 十二月第十二班的軍長是俄陀聶家族尼陀法人黑玳，他那一班有二萬四千人。

en: Over the tribes of Israel, for the Reubenites, Eliezer the son of Zichri was chief officer; for the Simeonites, Shephatiah the son of Maacah;
zh: 掌管以色列各支派的記在下面：流本支派的首領是細基利的兒子以利以謝；西緬支派的首領是瑪迦的兒子示法提雅；

en: for Levi, Hashabiah the son of Kemuel; for Aaron, Zadok;
zh: 利未支派的首領是基母利的兒子哈沙比雅；亞倫子孫的首領是撒督；

en: for Judah, Elihu, one of David's brothers; for Issachar, Omri the son of Michael;
zh: 猶大支派的首領是大衛的哥哥以利戶；以薩迦支派的首領是米迦勒的兒子暗利；

en: for Zebulun, Ishmaiah the son of Obadiah; for Naphtali, Jeremoth the son of Azriel;
zh: 西布倫支派的首領是俄巴第雅的兒子伊施瑪雅；拿弗他利支派的首領是亞斯列的兒子耶利摩；

en: for the Ephraimites, Hoshea the son of Azaziah; for the half-tribe of Manasseh, Joel the son of Pedaiah;
zh: 以法蓮支派的首領是阿撒細雅的兒子何細亞；瑪拿西半個支派的首領是毘大雅的兒子約珥；

en: for the half-tribe of Manasseh in Gilead, Iddo the son of Zechariah; for Benjamin, Jaasiel the son of Abner;
zh: 基列地瑪拿西那半個支派的首領是撒迦利亞的兒子易多；便雅憫支派的首領是押尼珥的兒子雅西業；

en: for Dan, Azarel the son of Jeroham. These were the leaders of the tribes of Israel.
zh: 但支派的首領是耶羅罕的兒子亞薩列。以上這些人是以色列各支派的領袖。

en: David did not count those below twenty years of age, for the LORD had promised to make Israel as many as the stars of heaven.
zh: 以色列人二十歲以下的，大衛都沒有登記他們的數目，因為耶和華曾經說過要增添以色列人的數目，好像天上的星那樣多。

en: Joab the son of Zeruiah began to count, but did not finish. Yet wrath came upon Israel for this, and the number was not entered in the chronicles of King David.
zh: 洗魯雅的兒子約押開始數點，但還沒有完成，為了這事耶和華的忿怒就臨到以色列人身上，所以以色列的人數沒有記在大衛王的年錄上。

en: Over the king's treasuries was Azmaveth the son of Adiel; and over the treasuries in the country, in the cities, in the villages and in the towers, was Jonathan the son of Uzziah;
zh: 管理王的庫房的，是亞疊的兒子押斯馬威；管理郊野、城市、鄉村和望樓的倉庫的，是烏西雅的兒子約拿單；

en: and over those who did the work of the field for tilling the soil was Ezri the son of Chelub;
zh: 管理耕田種地的，是基綠的兒子以斯利；

en: and over the vineyards was Shimei the Ramathite; and over the produce of the vineyards for the wine cellars was Zabdi the Shiphmite.
zh: 管理葡萄園的，是拉瑪人示每；管理園裡酒庫的，是實弗米人撒巴底；

en: Over the olive and sycamore trees in the Shephelah was Baal-hanan the Gederite; and over the stores of oil was Joash.
zh: 管理高原橄欖樹和桑樹的，是基第利人巴力．哈南；管理油庫的，是約阿施；

en: Over the herds that pastured in Sharon was Shitrai the Sharonite; over the herds in the valleys was Shaphat the son of Adlai.
zh: 管理在沙崙牧放的牛群的，是沙崙人施提賚；管理在山谷的牛群的，是亞第賚的兒子沙法；

en: Over the camels was Obil the Ishmaelite; and over the donkeys was Jehdeiah the Meronothite. Over the flocks was Jaziz the Hagrite.
zh: 管理駱駝的，是以實瑪利人阿比勒；管理驢群的，是米崙人耶希底亞；

en: All these were stewards of King David's property.
zh: 管理羊群的，是夏甲人雅悉。以上這些人都是給大衛王管理產業的官員。

en: Jonathan, David's uncle, was a counselor, being a man of understanding and a scribe. He and Jehiel the son of Hachmoni attended the king's sons.
zh: 大衛的叔父約拿單是一個謀士；這人很有智慧，又是一個經學家；哈摩尼的兒子耶歇是王眾子的老師。

en: Ahithophel was the king's counselor, and Hushai the Archite was the king's friend.
zh: 亞希多弗也是王的謀士；亞基人戶篩是王的朋友；

en: Ahithophel was succeeded by Jehoiada the son of Benaiah, and Abiathar. Joab was commander of the king's army.
zh: 亞希多弗以後，有比拿雅的兒子耶何耶大和亞比亞他，接續他作謀士；約押作王的元帥。
